title: UK REACH restriction for lead in ammunition, 27 June 2025
body: "Decision on a restriction proposal for lead in ammunition under UK REACH.  Restricted uses   Use of lead bullets and shot for live quarry and target shooting. This restriction comes with specific derogations and exemptions.  Date of decision   27 June 2025  Draft amendment  The draft amendment has been produced in accordance with the provisions of the UK REACH Regulations, regarding Annex 17 of UK REACH Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 of the European Parliament and of the Council . "
